Script.name: DragonCore
Script.script:
-- ========================================================= -- Dragon_Core.lua (STATIC) -- - Config, state, venomMap, helpers, overrides -- - Tracks: -- * Bite cooldown (via your bite trigger calling dragon.noteBite) -- * Prone (fast local cache set by your prone/stand triggers) -- * Shield via TTracker (swaps rend -> tailsmash) -- - Builds and sends the attack command (buildAttackCmd / attack) -- - Integrates with zgui.combatState ready-edge to auto-bite prone targets -- - Internal send wrapper NEVER queues; it only send(cmd) -- -- ATTACK FLOW: -- dragon.attack() -- -> calls dragon.autoPick(t) [lives in Dragon_Dynamic.lua] -- returns curseAff, rendAff -- -> checks TTracker for shield -- -> if hard def up: dragoncurse + tailsmash + breathgust -- -> if clear: dragoncurse + rend + breathgust -- =========================================================
dragon = dragon or {}
-- ---------------------------- -- CONFIG (defaults) (merge-safe) -- ---------------------------- dragon.cfg = dragon.cfg or { limbDefault = dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.limbDefault or "left leg", autoEnabled = (dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.autoEnabled ~= nil) and dragon.cfg.autoEnabled or true, debug = (dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.debug) or false,
recentWindowSec = tonumber(dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.recentWindowSec) or 8, impaCooldownSec = tonumber(dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.impaCooldownSec) or 8, sensAlignCooldownSec = tonumber(dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.sensAlignCooldownSec) or 10, biteCooldownSec = tonumber(dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.biteCooldownSec) or 3, }
dragon.cfg.limbDefault = "left leg"
-- ---------------------------- -- FALLBACKS (affliction names) -- ---------------------------- dragon.fallback = dragon.fallback or {} dragon.fallback.curseAff = tostring(dragon.fallback.curseAff or ""):lower() dragon.fallback.rendAff = tostring(dragon.fallback.rendAff or ""):lower()
if dragon.fallback.curseAff == "" or dragon.fallback.curseAff == "nil" then dragon.fallback.curseAff = "impatience" end if dragon.fallback.rendAff == "" or dragon.fallback.rendAff == "nil" then dragon.fallback.rendAff = "sensitivity" end
-- ---------------------------- -- ONE-SHOT OVERRIDE STATE -- ---------------------------- dragon.next = dragon.next or { aff1 = nil, aff2 = nil, limb = nil }
-- ---------------------------- -- STATE (cooldowns + tracking) (merge-safe) -- ---------------------------- dragon.state = dragon.state or { impaLockoutUntil = 0, sensAlignLockoutUntil = 0, lastPrefararAt = 0, lastBiteAt = {}, }
dragon.state.prone = dragon.state.prone or {}
-- ---------------------------- -- VENOM MAP (AFF -> VENOM KEYWORD) -- ---------------------------- dragon.venomMap = dragon.venomMap or { sensitivity = "prefarar", paralysis = "curare", slickness = "gecko", anorexia = "slike", asthma = "kalmia", impatience = nil, }
-- ---------------------------- -- Valid limbs -- ---------------------------- dragon.validLimbs = dragon.validLimbs or { ["left leg"] = true, ["right leg"] = true, ["left arm"] = true, ["right arm"] = true, ["torso"] = true, ["head"] = true, }
-- ========================================================= -- Helpers -- ========================================================= local function trim(s) s = tostring(s or "") return (s:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end
local function lname(s) return trim(s):lower() end
local function dlog(msg) if dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.debug then cecho(("\n<grey>[DR] %s\n"):format(tostring(msg))) end end
local function now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then return getEpoch() end return os.time() end
local function meNameLower() local n = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status and gmcp.Char.Status.name return tostring(n or ""):lower() end
local function getTarget() if Targets and type(Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd) == "function" then local t = Targets.getCombatTargetForCmd() t = trim(t) if t ~= "" then return t end end return nil end
-- ========================================================= -- TTRACKER HARD DEF HELPERS -- Reads TTracker.state[target].shield only. -- No dependency on bm. -- ========================================================= local function _ttrackerState(t) if not (TTracker and type(TTracker.state) == "table") then return nil end local tl = tostring(t or ""):lower() local st = TTracker.state[t] or TTracker.state[tl] if type(st) == "table" then return st end -- case-insensitive fallback for k, v in pairs(TTracker.state) do if type(k) == "string" and k:lower() == tl and type(v) == "table" then return v end end return nil end
local function _targetHasShield(t) local st = _ttrackerState(trim(t)) return type(st) == "table" and st.shield == true end
-- ========================================================= -- Prone tracking -- ========================================================= function dragon.setProne(name, isProne) name = trim(name) if name == "" then return end dragon.state.prone[lname(name)] = (isProne == true) dlog(("prone[%s]=%s"):format(name, tostring(isProne == true))) end
function dragon.isProne(name) name = trim(name) if name == "" then return false end return dragon.state.prone[lname(name)] == true end
-- ========================================================= -- AFF TRACKER ADAPTER (READ-ONLY) -- ========================================================= local function affScore(aff) aff = tostring(aff or ""):lower() if aff == "" then return 0 end if affstrack and type(affstrack.score) == "table" then return tonumber(affstrack.score[aff]) or 0 end return 0 end
local function affAtLeast(aff, n) n = tonumber(n) or 1 return affScore(aff) >= n end
local function rendVenomForAff(aff) aff = tostring(aff or ""):lower() if aff == "" or aff == "nil" then return nil end return dragon.venomMap and dragon.venomMap[aff] or nil end
-- ========================================================= -- SEND WRAPPER (NO QUEUEING) -- ========================================================= local function sendCmd(cmd) cmd = trim(cmd) if cmd == "" then return end send(cmd) end
-- ========================================================= -- Bite cooldown tracking -- ========================================================= function dragon.noteBite(attacker, victim) attacker = tostring(attacker or ""):lower() victim = tostring(victim or ""):lower() if victim == "" then return end if attacker ~= "" and attacker ~= meNameLower() then return end dragon.state.lastBiteAt = dragon.state.lastBiteAt or {} dragon.state.lastBiteAt[victim] = now() end
function dragon.canBiteTarget(victim) victim = tostring(victim or ""):lower() if victim == "" then return false end dragon.state.lastBiteAt = dragon.state.lastBiteAt or {} local last = tonumber(dragon.state.lastBiteAt[victim]) or 0 return (now() - last) >= (dragon.cfg.biteCooldownSec or 3) end
-- ========================================================= -- One-shot override -- overrideNext(curseAff, rendAff [, limb]) -- rendAff is an AFFLICTION name — mapped via venomMap at build-time -- ========================================================= function dragon.overrideNext(aff1, aff2, limb) aff1 = tostring(aff1 or ""):lower() aff2 = tostring(aff2 or ""):lower() limb = tostring(limb or ""):lower()
if aff1 == "" or aff2 == "" or aff1 == "nil" or aff2 == "nil" then cecho("\n<red>[DR] overrideNext requires TWO afflictions: overrideNext(curseAff, rendAff[, limb])\n") return end
if not rendVenomForAff(aff2) then cecho("\n<red>[DR] overrideNext: rend aff '"..aff2.."' has no venomMap entry.\n") end
dragon.next.aff1 = aff1 dragon.next.aff2 = aff2 dragon.next.limb = (limb ~= "" and limb) or nil
cecho(("\n<yellow>[DR] Next override: <white>%s<yellow> + <white>%s<yellow>%s\n") :format(aff1, aff2, dragon.next.limb and (" (limb "..dragon.next.limb..")") or "")) end
function dragon.clearOverride() dragon.next.aff1, dragon.next.aff2, dragon.next.limb = nil, nil, nil cecho("\n<yellow>[DR] Next attack override cleared.\n") end
-- ========================================================= -- Public helper accessors for Dragon_Dynamic.lua -- ========================================================= dragon._core = dragon._core or {} dragon._core.dlog = dlog dragon._core.now = now
function dragon._getTarget() return getTarget() end function dragon._affAtLeast(a, n) return affAtLeast(a, n) end function dragon._rendVenomForAff(a) return rendVenomForAff(a) end function dragon._sendCmd(cmd) return sendCmd(cmd) end
-- ========================================================= -- Toggles -- ========================================================= function dragon.autoToggle() dragon.cfg.autoEnabled = not dragon.cfg.autoEnabled cecho("\n<yellow>[DR] autoEnabled = <white>"..tostring(dragon.cfg.autoEnabled).."\n") end
function dragon.debugToggle() dragon.cfg.debug = not dragon.cfg.debug cecho("\n<yellow>[DR] debug = <white>"..tostring(dragon.cfg.debug).."\n") end
-- ========================================================= -- BUILD ATTACK COMMAND -- Calls dragon.autoPick(t) from Dragon_Dynamic.lua to get -- curseAff + rendAff, then builds the queue command. -- Checks TTracker for shield -> swaps rend for tailsmash. -- ========================================================= function dragon.buildAttackCmd() local t = getTarget() if not t or t == "" then dlog("No combat target.") return nil end
local curseAff, rendAff, limb
-- One-shot override takes priority if dragon.next and dragon.next.aff1 and dragon.next.aff2 then curseAff = dragon.next.aff1 rendAff = dragon.next.aff2 limb = dragon.next.limb dlog(("override: curse=%s rend=%s%s") :format(curseAff, rendAff, limb and (" limb="..limb) or "")) dragon.next.aff1, dragon.next.aff2, dragon.next.limb = nil, nil, nil else -- Delegate aff selection entirely to Dynamic if type(dragon.autoPick) ~= "function" then cecho("\n<red>[DR] dragon.autoPick not found — is Dragon_Dynamic.lua loaded?\n") return nil end curseAff, rendAff, limb = dragon.autoPick(t) end
curseAff = tostring(curseAff or ""):lower() rendAff = tostring(rendAff or ""):lower()
if curseAff == "" or curseAff == "nil" then curseAff = tostring(dragon.cfg.defaultCurseAff or dragon.fallback.curseAff or "impatience") end if rendAff == "" or rendAff == "nil" then rendAff = tostring(dragon.cfg.defaultRendAff or dragon.fallback.rendAff or "sensitivity") end
limb = tostring(limb or dragon.cfg.limbDefault or "left leg"):lower() if not (dragon.validLimbs and dragon.validLimbs[limb]) then cecho("\n<red>[DR] Invalid limb: '"..limb.."'.\n") return nil end
local venom = rendVenomForAff(rendAff) if not venom then cecho("\n<red>[DR] REND blocked: no venomMap entry for '"..rendAff.."'.\n") return nil end
-- Shield check: magical shield -> tailsmash instead of rend local hardDef = _targetHasShield(t)
local c1 = ("dragoncurse %s %s 1"):format(t, curseAff) local c2 = hardDef and ("tailsmash %s"):format(t) or ("rend %s %s %s"):format(t, limb, venom) local c3 = ("breathgust %s"):format(t) local sep = tostring(dragon.cfg.cmdSep or "|") local line = table.concat({c1, c2, c3}, sep)
if dragon.cfg.debug then local tag = hardDef and "<red>[HARDDEF]</red> " or "" cecho(("\n<cyan>[DR BUILD]</cyan> %s%s\n"):format(tag, line)) end
return ("queue insert !t!w!pub 2 %s"):format(line) end
-- ========================================================= -- ATTACK (send the built command) -- ========================================================= function dragon.attack() local cmd = trim(tostring(dragon.buildAttackCmd() or "")) if cmd ~= "" then send(cmd) end return false end
-- ========================================================= -- PRONE BITE (default; Dragon_Dynamic.lua may override) -- ========================================================= dragon.proneAttackCmd = dragon.proneAttackCmd or function(t) return "queue insert !t!w!pub 1 bite " .. tostring(t) end
-- ========================================================= -- COMBATSTATE INTEGRATION (AUTO BITE ON PRONE) -- ========================================================= local function _readyNow() if type(zguiHaveBal) == "function" then local mode = zgui and zgui.combatState and zgui.combatState.readyMode or "bal" if mode == "baleq" then return (type(zguiHaveBalEq) == "function" and zguiHaveBalEq()) or false end return zguiHaveBal() end local v = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals if not v then return false end local bal = tostring(v.bal or v.balance or "") == "1" local eq = tostring(v.eq or v.equilibrium or "") == "1" local mode = zgui and zgui.combatState and zgui.combatState.readyMode or "bal" if mode == "baleq" then return (bal and eq) end return bal end
if zgui and zgui.combatState and type(zgui.combatState.registerReadyHandler) == "function" then zgui.combatState.registerReadyHandler("dragon_prone", function() if not (zgui and zgui.autoQueue and zgui.autoQueue.enabled) then return end
local cls = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Status and gmcp.Char.Status.class if not (cls and cls:find("Dragon", 1, true)) then return end
if not (dragon and dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.autoEnabled) then return end
local t = nil if type(zguiGetCombatTarget) == "function" then t = zguiGetCombatTarget() else t = getTarget() end t = trim(t or "") if t == "" then return end
if not _readyNow() then return end if not dragon.isProne(t) then return end if dragon.canBiteTarget and not dragon.canBiteTarget(t) then return end
local cmd = nil if type(dragon.proneAttackCmd) == "function" then cmd = dragon.proneAttackCmd(t) end cmd = trim(cmd or "") if cmd == "" then return end
send(cmd) dragon.setProne(t, false) end) end

Script.name: DragonDynamic
Script.script:
-- ========================================================= -- Dragon_Dynamic.lua (DYNAMIC) -- - Decides WHAT to curse and rend each attack -- - Exposes dragon.autoPick(target) -> curseAff, rendAff -- - Manages cursePrio / rendPrio lists -- - Tracks deafness/calamine (influences aff selection only) -- - NO command building, NO TTracker, NO sending -- -- Called by Dragon_Core.lua: -- curseAff, rendAff, limb = dragon.autoPick(target) -- -- PRIORITY CONTROL: -- dragon.setCursePrio("impatience","paralysis","anorexia",...) -- dragon.setRendPrio("curare","prefarar","gecko",...) <- venom OR aff names -- dragon.showPrio() -- =========================================================
dragon = dragon or {} if not dragon._core then cecho("\n<red>[DR] Dragon_Core.lua must load before Dragon_Dynamic.lua\n") return end
local dlog = dragon._core.dlog local now = dragon._core.now
dragon.cfg = dragon.cfg or {} dragon.state = dragon.state or {} dragon.next = dragon.next or { aff1=nil, aff2=nil, limb=nil }
dragon.cfg.autoEnabled = (dragon.cfg.autoEnabled ~= nil) and dragon.cfg.autoEnabled or true dragon.cfg.defaultCurseAff = tostring(dragon.cfg.defaultCurseAff or (dragon.fallback and dragon.fallback.curseAff) or "impatience"):lower() dragon.cfg.defaultRendAff = tostring(dragon.cfg.defaultRendAff or (dragon.fallback and dragon.fallback.rendAff) or "sensitivity"):lower()
-- venomMap lives in Core; reference it read-only here dragon.venomMap = dragon.venomMap or {}
-- ========================================================= -- PRIORITY LISTS -- cursePrio : affliction names, in order, for dragoncurse -- rendPrio : affliction names, in order, for rend -- ========================================================= dragon.cursePrio = dragon.cursePrio or { "impatience", "paralysis", "asthma", "slickness", "anorexia", "sensitivity", }
dragon.rendPrio = dragon.rendPrio or { "paralysis", "asthma", "clumsiness", "sensitivity", "slickness", "anorexia", "stupidity", }
-- ========================================================= -- Reverse-lookup: venom keyword -> affliction name -- ========================================================= local function affForVenom(venom) venom = tostring(venom or ""):lower() if venom == "" then return nil end for aff, v in pairs(dragon.venomMap) do if tostring(v or ""):lower() == venom then return aff end end return nil end
-- ========================================================= -- PRIORITY SETTERS -- =========================================================
-- dragon.setCursePrio("impatience", "paralysis", ...) function dragon.setCursePrio(...) local args = {...} if #args == 1 and type(args[1]) == "table" then args = args[1] end
local newPrio = {} for _, v in ipairs(args) do local aff = tostring(v or ""):lower():gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if aff ~= "" then table.insert(newPrio, aff) end end
if #newPrio == 0 then cecho("\n<red>[DR] setCursePrio: no valid afflictions given.\n") return end
dragon.cursePrio = newPrio cecho("\n<yellow>[DR] cursePrio: <white>" .. table.concat(newPrio, " > ") .. "\n") end
-- dragon.setRendPrio("curare", "prefarar", ...) <- venom OR aff names both work function dragon.setRendPrio(...) local args = {...} if #args == 1 and type(args[1]) == "table" then args = args[1] end
local newPrio = {} for _, v in ipairs(args) do local raw = tostring(v or ""):lower():gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if raw ~= "" then local aff = nil if dragon.venomMap[raw] ~= nil then aff = raw -- it's already an aff name else aff = affForVenom(raw) -- it's a venom keyword end
if aff then table.insert(newPrio, aff) else cecho("\n<red>[DR] setRendPrio: '<white>"..raw.."<red>' unknown. Skipped.\n") end end end
if #newPrio == 0 then cecho("\n<red>[DR] setRendPrio: no valid entries given.\n") return end
dragon.rendPrio = newPrio
local parts = {} for _, aff in ipairs(newPrio) do local vn = dragon.venomMap[aff] table.insert(parts, vn and (aff.."("..vn..")") or aff) end cecho("\n<yellow>[DR] rendPrio: <white>" .. table.concat(parts, " > ") .. "\n") end
-- dragon.showPrio() function dragon.showPrio() local cp = {} for i, aff in ipairs(dragon.cursePrio or {}) do table.insert(cp, i..":"..aff) end local rp = {} for i, aff in ipairs(dragon.rendPrio or {}) do local vn = (dragon.venomMap and dragon.venomMap[aff]) or "?" table.insert(rp, ("%d:%s(%s)"):format(i, aff, vn)) end cecho("\n<yellow>[DR] <white>Curse prio:<yellow> " .. (#cp > 0 and table.concat(cp, " > ") or "(empty)") .. "\n") cecho( "<yellow>[DR] <white>Rend prio:<yellow> " .. (#rp > 0 and table.concat(rp, " > ") or "(empty)") .. "\n") end
-- ========================================================= -- DEAFNESS / CALAMINE TRACKING -- Only affects aff selection (skips sensitivity when deaf). -- ========================================================= dragon.state.deaf = dragon.state.deaf or {} dragon.state.lastCalamineAt = dragon.state.lastCalamineAt or {}
local function _tkey(t) return tostring(t or ""):lower() end
function dragon.markTargetAteCalamine(who) who = _tkey(who) if who == "" then return end dragon.state.deaf[who] = true dragon.state.lastCalamineAt[who] = now() dlog(("deaf: %s ate calamine -> deaf=true"):format(who)) end
local function _isDeaf(t) return dragon.state.deaf[_tkey(t)] == true end
local function _setDeaf(t, val, why) t = _tkey(t) if t == "" then return end dragon.state.deaf[t] = (val == true) dlog(("deaf: %s -> %s (%s)"):format(t, tostring(val == true), tostring(why or ""))) end
-- ========================================================= -- AUTO PICK -- Returns curseAff, rendAff (affliction names) for Core to use. -- Does NOT build commands. Does NOT check TTracker. -- ========================================================= function dragon.autoPick(target) if not (dragon.cfg and dragon.cfg.autoEnabled) then return nil, nil, nil end
-- What does the target already have? local has = {} for _, aff in ipairs(dragon.cursePrio or {}) do has[aff] = dragon._affAtLeast(aff, 100) end for _, aff in ipairs(dragon.rendPrio or {}) do has[aff] = dragon._affAtLeast(aff, 100) end
-- Best rend aff: first in rendPrio that target lacks -- Skip sensitivity if target is deaf local rendAff = nil for _, aff in ipairs(dragon.rendPrio or {}) do if not has[aff] then if aff == "sensitivity" and _isDeaf(target) then dlog("autoPick: skipping sensitivity (target deaf)") else rendAff = aff break end end end
-- Best curse aff: first in cursePrio that target lacks, not same as rendAff local curseAff = nil for _, aff in ipairs(dragon.cursePrio or {}) do if aff ~= rendAff and not has[aff] then curseAff = aff break end end
-- Clear deaf flag if we're pushing sensitivity anyway local tkey = _tkey(target) if curseAff == "sensitivity" or rendAff == "sensitivity" then if _isDeaf(tkey) then _setDeaf(tkey, false, "sensitivity step -> clear deaf") end end
dlog(("autoPick: curse=%s rend=%s"):format(tostring(curseAff), tostring(rendAff)))
return curseAff, rendAff, nil end
-- ========================================================= -- PRONE BITE QUEUE POLICY (override Core default) -- ========================================================= dragon.proneAttackCmd = function(t) return "queue insert !t!w!pub 1 bite " .. tostring(t) end
